name: TradingView AI Super Score → Perplexity → Telegram

parameters.url: =https://api.polygon.io/v3/snapshot/options/{{ $json.ticker }}?strike_price.gte={{ Math.floor(Number($json.price) * 0.93) }}&strike_price.lte={{ Math.ceil(Number($json.price) * 1.07) }}&expiration_date.gte={{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}&expiration_date.lte={{ new Date(Date.now() + 14*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}&limit=250&apiKey=LxG0VrVzcQYEtWDfg8d6G49iapiC4Ec_

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

// Sheet Row Builder v4 — Row data serialized to JSON body string
const inp = $input.first().json;
const safe = v => (v === null || v === undefined) ? '' : String(v).substring(0, 500);

const row = [
  safe(inp['Timestamp']),
  safe(inp['Date']),
  safe(inp['Ticker']),
  safe(inp['Strategy']),
  safe(inp['TF']),
  safe(inp['Execution']),
  safe(inp['Signal']),
  safe(inp['Price']),
  safe(inp['Bull']),
  safe(inp['Bear']),
  safe(inp['RSI'] || inp['rsi'] || ''),
  safe(inp['ADX'] || inp['adx'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX'] || inp['vix'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Regime'] || inp['regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Daily Trend'] || inp['daily_trend'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SPY'] || inp['spy_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp['QQQ'] || inp['qqq_status'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Net%"] || inp['strat_net_pct'] || ''),
  safe(inp["WR%"] || inp['strat_win_rate'] || ''),
  safe(inp['PF']  || inp['strat_profit_factor'] || ''),
  safe(inp['MaxDD'] || inp['strat_max_dd'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Trades'] || inp['strat_total_trades'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Options'] || inp['opt_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Dark Pool'] || inp['dp_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Cross-Asset'] || inp['ca_regime'] || ''),
  safe(inp['CA Score'] || inp['ca_composite_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['SM Conf'] || inp['_sm_max_confidence'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Score'] || inp['_vc_score'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Verdict'] || inp['_vc_verdict'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Pass'] || inp['_vc_pass'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Feedback'] || inp['_vc_feedback'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VC Red Flags'] || ''),
  safe(inp['DD Halt'] || inp['dd_halt'] || ''),
  safe(inp['VIX Size'] || inp['vix_size_mult'] || ''),
  safe(inp["Pos Size%"] || inp['eff_position_size'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Outcome'] || inp['outcome'] || ''),
  safe(inp["P&L"] || inp['pnl'] || ''),
  safe(inp['Notes'] || ''),
];

const body = JSON.stringify({
  range: "Sheet1",
  majorDimension: "ROWS",
  values: [row]
});

return [{ json: { ...inp, _sheet_body: body } }];

// Fixed: pass only first item to prevent VC pipeline multiplication
return [$input.first()];

nodes.name: Grok Signal Analyzer
nodes.notes:
GROK SIGNAL ANALYZER — Portfolio fit analysis via Grok-3-fast.
After VC Gate PASS, before Format Telegram + Alpaca + Sheets.
Non-blocking: pipeline continues on error (15s timeout).
Adds: grok_signal_analysis, grok_recommendation, grok_analyzer_error, grok_analyzer_timestamp.
To rollback: disconnect this node, reconnect VC Gate output 0 directly to Format Telegram + Alpaca + VC Pass Logger.
